title: plugin-manager:agent-plugin-type
description: Defines the agent plugin interface that extends `SpecdPlugin` for agent integrations (Claude, Copilot, Codex, etc.).
context: Defines the agent plugin interface that extends `SpecdPlugin` for agent integrations (Claude, Copilot, Codex, etc.).

rules:
`AgentPlugin` MUST extend `SpecdPlugin` with `type: 'agent'` and add:

- `install(projectRoot: string, options?: InstallOptions): Promise<InstallResult>`
- `uninstall(projectRoot: string, options?: InstallOptions): Promise<void>`

constraints: Agent plugins specialize the base plugin type for agent integrations.

scenarios.name: Has install and uninstall
then: it has install() and uninstall() methods
